programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A former bookie falls under suspicion for the murder of a hospital benefactor, who is found dead in his car. As the detectives investigate the case, it becomes clear their prime suspect had a strong motive, believing the victim was responsible for putting his daughter into a coma. Brian Cox guest stars, with John Thaw and Kevin Whately(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Chaos reigns after an unknown sniper shoots a woman as she leaves a meeting of the flower show committee. DS Rachel Dawson's enquiries reveal the gunman may have missed his intended target - and when Blaketon spots an article in the local paper, he realises the bullet might have been aimed at him. Meanwhile, Peggy buys an ice-cream van to take advantage of the hot weather, but makes the mistake of leaving David in charge of the project. Lindsey Coulson guests alongside Derek Fowlds and Clare Wille(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ned tells Linda to start pulling her weight around the house. Frank wants to set up a trust fund for Chris and Rachel's baby. Betty's caravan goes for an unexpected journey(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Angharad tries to talk to Bernard about their future. Caroline nags Nick about getting a girlfriend. Eric calls into the Woolpack and demands his money back from Alan(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise refuses to speak to Ken, and Fiona is shocked when Steve asks her to move in with him. Audrey threatens to resign if Alf does not get the limo back(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gail is happy when Nick says he will spend Christmas at home. Fiona worries about losing her job. Reg tells Maureen he wants them to have a life away from the shop(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate the apparent suicide of a solicitor rumoured to have been stealing money from clients. When rival lawyer Otto Benham is later found murdered in a bizarre manner, the detectives begin to suspect the two deaths may be related. Mystery, starring John Nettles, John Hopkins, Barry Jackson, James Weber Brown and Oliver Ford Davies(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Chaos reigns after an unknown sniper shoots a woman as she leaves a meeting of the flower show committee. DS Rachel Dawson's enquiries reveal the gunman may have missed his intended target - and when Blaketon spots an article in the local paper, he realises the bullet might have been aimed at him. Meanwhile, Peggy buys an ice-cream van to take advantage of the hot weather, but makes the mistake of leaving David in charge of the project. Lindsey Coulson guests alongside Derek Fowlds and Clare Wille(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When dairy worker Debbie Moffett (played by Martine McCutcheon) is crushed to death by a giant round of cheese at the home of the world-famous Midsomer Blue, Barnaby and Jones are soon on the case. Pathologist Kate Wilding discovers the victim's daughter was being expelled from the local prep school and it emerges Debbie died just hours after an argument at a parents' council meeting. Her phone leads the detectives to Oliver Ordish, with whom she was having an affair(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Janet reopens the investigation into the murder of childhood friend Veronica, Rachel receives news that makes her personal life even more complicated, and a teenage murderer is successfully charged, but horrific events start to unravel following his arrest. Crime drama, guest starring Sally Lindsay, with Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A former bookie falls under suspicion for the murder of a hospital benefactor, who is found dead in his car. As the detectives investigate the case, it becomes clear their prime suspect had a strong motive, believing the victim was responsible for putting his daughter into a coma. Brian Cox guest stars, with John Thaw and Kevin Whately(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida's day goes from bad to worse when she suffers with a bad toothache, and Mrs Price pays a visit for tea(n)

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida gets more than she bargained for when she volunteers to help with a sponsored wake(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Abi seeks an alibi when Ray reports her to the police. James finds the courage to tell Ed that he is gay. Chesney and Gemma deal with an upsetting diagnosis(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vanessa is left desperate, while Charity is left feeling disheartened. Elsewhere, Moira and Cain brace themselves up at the farm, and Leyla makes her move(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A local woman is found murdered following a row with her husband at a residents' association Spanish-themed evening. The finger of suspicion soon points to an odd-job man with a violent history, and the chairman of the association reveals he heard a squeaking noise after the victim left - but the witness promptly winds up dead himself. Crime drama, starring John Nettles(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: An amateur archaeologist publishes a book about his father's discovery of Celtic artefacts in an ancient mound, and plans a celebration on the site - but landowner Gareth Heldman is less than keen on the idea. While out walking, Joyce spots Heldman arguing with a woman, and hours later he winds up stabbed to death with an old weapon that bears a striking resemblance to the one found during the dig. John Nettles and John Hopkins star(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Coma victim Harriet Farmer finally wakes up a year after she was attacked while trying to elope, but her boyfriend Finn Robson is still missing. Soon after she regains consciousness, members of a chess club are targeted by a killer. Could the assault that left Harriet for dead be linked to moves on a games board? Guest starring Fay Ripley (Cold Feet), with Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: Captain Perrin throws a huge party to celebrate the ship's first birthday, with executive chef Shaun creating a giant cake that is so heavy it takes 10 men to carry - and they soon come unstuck when they cannot fit the ship-shaped sponge into the lift. Passengers Norman and Maria are looking forward to attending the lavish formal party, although they will be going nowhere unless front-desk supervisor Herbert can locate their missing luggage, which contains his tuxedo and her party frock. Dancer Dulcie faces her staff appraisal, and a visit from her boyfriend helps with her homesickness(n)

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: Romance is in the air for casino host Cecilia and assistant maitre d' Alberto - and she already has clear ideas about the size of her engagement ring. Things are not so happy for waitress Valeria, whose relationship ended when her boyfriend left the ship and now a close friend is leaving too. However, it isn't long until a new beau catches her eye. Timothy came on board after splitting from his partner of four years - but he has little time to worry about his broken heart in his new job with the shore excursions team, especially when he runs into hot water with a couple of misplaced passengers(n)

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's India
programme.desc: Joanna's adventures across India conclude as she explores Rajasthan, Delhi and the mountainous North West, before ending in Kashmir, the place of her birth. Her first stop takes her to the Ranthambhore National Park, where she learns about the Wildlife Protection Society of India's tiger conservation programmes. Joanna's next stop takes her to the city of Delhi, where she begins her exploration of the capital at Humayun's Tomb, before ending her 5000 mile journey in Srinagar in Kashmi, the place where she was born(n)

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: The clinic is pushed to its limits when a building collapses in Barco and the doctors face a desperate struggle to save the injured survivors. Ruby's objectivity is put to the test when she discovers a secret concerning one of her patients, and Ram helps a woman whose husband is missing(n)

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: The Royle Family's Sue Johnston guest stars in the final episode of the current series, which sees the staff of the hospital coming together to celebrate Ram and Mala's wedding. Ruby and Gabriel intervene in a dispute that has erupted between two fishermen, while a heart to heart at the wedding ceremony brings the two doctors closer together. Meanwhile, Lydia is confronted with a difficult dilemma when she receives a visit from her former mentor, who has come to the hospital seeking her help(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian detective, who usually only accepts cases of national importance, bends his rules for once and finds himself in run-down Clapham. He investigates the disappearance of a local cook and becomes intrigued by the contents of the woman's trunk. David Suchet stars, alongside Hugh Fraser and Brigit Forsyth(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A woman's body is discovered in Captain Hastings' garage on Bonfire Night. It transpires that the deceased was due to marry an MP - and although the evidence suggests suicide, the Belgian detective suspects foul play. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson star(n)

programme.title: The Halcyon
programme.desc: Joe is offered the opportunity of a lifetime, but finds himself unexpectedly torn as the moral responsibility of staying in England to tell the story of the war weighs heavily on his shoulders. Betsey's mother Gloria comes for a surprise stay, leaving Sonny unsettled and wary of the reaction she incites from Betsey, while Lucian and Lady Hamilton continue their flirtation and Emma anxiously awaits news of Freddie when she hears that a plane from Squadron 392 has gone down(n)

programme.desc: Vanessa is left desperate, while Charity is left feeling disheartened. Elsewhere, Moira and Cain brace themselves up at the farm, and Leyla makes her move(n)

programme.title: How the West Was Won (1962)
programme.desc: Three generations of a pioneering family experience many ordeals and adventures in their endeavour to build a new life for themselves on the American frontier in the 19th century. programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates the fatal shooting of a South American president's son at a polo match, and finds that the victim's step-sister is unknowingly dating one of the terrorists involved. Ruby Wax and Pierce Brosnan feature in early screen appearances, alongside stars Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan is forced to impose himself on an old girlfriend whose flat is conveniently near a bank that intelligence has revealed is to be raided. Once in position, he and Carter try to pinpoint a radio transmitter that is being used to coordinate the movements of the robbers. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: After the death of a truck driver, the coroner investigates illegally dumped hazardous waste threatening the lives of people whose homes are nearby(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A Puerto Rican cop goes undercover in his old neighbourhood to investigate reports of an extortion racket, only to uncover a plot to stir up a war between rival gangs(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar visits Venice to save a damsel in distress - only to find himself plunged headlong into a seedy underworld of gangsters, intrigue and deadly revenge. Roger Moore plays the suave secret agent, with William Sylvester, Patrick Troughton and Lois Maxwell(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur and Terry rescue Greek-Cypriot Charlie from a beating and learn that his cousin is being threatened by another relative who wants to take over their restaurant. Encouraged by Charlie who is vowing revenge, Terry takes a job in the establishment to try to catch the tormentors red-handed(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's schoolteacher girlfriend seeks CI5's assistance to quash a drug-smuggling ring after learning a 14-year-old pupil is involved having used then hidden a discarded firearm. The body count soon increases at an alarming rate as potential witnesses to a crime are killed off by the ruthless gang. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Celia Gregory star(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits southern Africa to see if he can track down a deadly fish that lurks in the eerie waters of the Okavango. A killer with shark-like teeth, there are stories of it hunting in packs and feeding on schooling fish or even human bodies. Jeremy is determined to find out if it is a giant piranha or something equally terrifying(n)

programme.title: Live Snooker: Players Championship
programme.desc: Rishi Persad presents coverage of the opening two first-round matches from the Waterfront in Southport, where the first players to win six frames will progress to the quarter-finals. This is the second of three tournaments making up the Coral Series and Neil Robertson prevailed in the opening one, the World Grand Prix, defeating Graeme Dott in the final. Robertson also reached the final here last year, meeting his match against Ronnie O'Sullivan, who prevailed 10-4 in the showpiece match. With analysis by Stephen Hendry, Alan McManus and Neal Foulds, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates(n)

programme.title: Training Day (2001)
programme.desc: A cop embarks on his first day in narcotics, partnering a seasoned officer whose willingness to flout the rules forces him to question everything he has learnt. As they resort to extreme measures to crack a case, the rookie is left battling his conscience in a dangerous situation. Thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Ethan Hawke, Scott Glenn and Tom Berenger(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's schoolteacher girlfriend seeks CI5's assistance to quash a drug-smuggling ring after learning a 14-year-old pupil is involved having used then hidden a discarded firearm. The body count soon increases at an alarming rate as potential witnesses to a crime are killed off by the ruthless gang. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Celia Gregory star(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade continues his investigations into supposedly deadly freshwater creatures. From right across the Amazon there are stories of a colossal fish that is said to swallow men whole. Some call it the 'lau-lau', others the 'piraiba'. But after 20 years of criss-crossing South America, Jeremy has never seen a specimen big enough to convince him that the fishermen's tales are true. In this programme, he heads to a remote and little-known backwater of Guyana on a mission to finally track down this alleged monster(n)

programme.title: Live Snooker: Players Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of two first-round matches from the Waterfront in Soutport, where the first players to win six frames will progress to the quarter-finals. Presented by Rishi Persad, with analysis by Alan McManus, Stephen Hendry and Neal Foulds, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A crooked foreign diplomat helps arrange the theft of a consignment of silver bullion being transported through Tilbury docks. Bodie and Doyle are assigned to investigate, and it becomes apparent that they have a useful link to the villains via Doyle's girlfriend Deborah. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan adopts a new identity as an ex-con and goes undercover as a truck driver to expose a gang of ruthless hijackers. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Live Snooker: Players Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of two more first-round matches from the Waterfront in Southport, where the first players to win six frames will progress to the quarter-finals. Current world number one Judd Trump was at his brilliant best at this stage last year, overwhelming Jimmy Robertson 6-0 to set up a quarter-final meeting wih Jack Lisowski, who prevailed 6-4 against Kyren Wilson. Presented by Rishi Persad, with analysis by Alan McManus, Stephen Hendry and Neal Foulds, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates(n)

programme.title: Zero Dark Thirty (2012)
programme.desc: A CIA operative joins a team of intelligence and military operatives in the aftermath of the September 11 attacks. She spends the next 10 years searching for information on the whereabouts of Osama bin Laden, ultimately leading to the final raid on the terrorist leader's hideout. Kathryn Bigelow's fact-based drama, starring Jessica Chastain and Mark Strong(n)

In this programme, he heads to a remote and little-known backwater of Guyana on a mission to finally track down this alleged monster(n)

The actor and history buff gets a masterclass working with border collie sheepdogs before heading to Nine Standards Rigg, a summit high on the backbone of Britain, where he contemplates the origins of the huge drystone cairns that dominate the skyline(n)

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: For years, London's East End was denied a new bridge because of the need to guarantee passage of ships up and down the Thames. For years, the greatest engineers of the age hunted for a design that would keep both road and water traffic moving. As Rob Bell explains, the solution came from architect Horace Jones, whose revolutionary design, with its thousand-tonne opening sections, was powered by nothing more than water. Rob also explains the bridge was lucky to survive the Second World War, having been a target for German V-1 flying bombs(n)

programme.title: Tony Robinson: Coast to Coast
programme.desc: The presenter reaches the North York Moors and takes to the skies for a bird's-eye view of the journey ahead from the cockpit of a glider from the Sutton Bank gliding club. Back on the ground, he admires the ruins of Rievaulx Abbey and learns the tale of power and greed that eventually brought down the monastery. In the orchards of Ampleforth Abbey, where rare heritage varieties are grown to produce juice and cider, Tony discovers a secret that evokes vivid memories of his childhood(n)

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall treats a rescue dog that steals food and barks at the front door - but finds the training techniques for one problem do not work quite as well with the other. Elsewhere, a jack russell with strong reactions to traffic makes going for a walk a potentially lethal experience, and two akitas have an aggressive dislike of all other dogs, which the owners fear may turn violent(n)

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Make a New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Ben travels to Britain's northernmost point to meet a former nanny who left London to pursue her dream of running her own farm. Her property is home to goats, sheep, rabbits, chickens and donkeys and features a vegetable delivery service, but the harsh weather of the remote region has taken its toll on the business through some challenging winters. Ben helps her to stock up the farm shop and meets some of the more unusual animals in her menagerie, including chickens that change sex and ponies that change colour(n)

programme.title: My New Greek Life
programme.desc: In Corfu, Charley takes a trip to the market, where she hopes to practice her Greek. She also faces a demanding first shift working at the hotel. A newly arrived couple expecting their first child face a difficult first winter on the island. In Crete, Kate finds an unexpected surprise in her new home, while Laura discusses her past career as a champion bodybuilder and the medical condition that causes pain all over her body(n)

programme.title: Eamonn & Ruth: How the Other Half Lives
programme.desc: Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford shed more light on the lives of the super-rich, taking their investigation beyond British shores to meet some of the wealthiest people on the planet. They begin with a trip to New York, which is reportedly home to more billionaires than anywhere else in the world. Eamonn introduces Mr Chatwal and his son Vikram, who run a hotel empire together, and are rich enough to enjoy treats such as 1,000-dollar ice cream sundaes covered in edible 24-carat gold. Ruth heads to the Hamptons, one of the most exclusive stretches of real-estate in the world, and meets party planner Andrea Correale, who caters to the weird and wonderful requests of a string of A-list clients. Finally, the take in New York's Upper East Side, where they interview the charismatic Mrs Barsky, who has lived in an apartment in the luxurious Carlyle Hotel for the past 23 years(n)

programme.title: Ever After: A Cinderella Story (1998)
programme.desc: A girl grows up in 16th-century Europe under the iron fist of her stepmother, until the love of handsome Prince Henry offers a glimmer of hope. Unfortunately, the royal gent has worries of his own in the shape of an arranged marriage. Luckily, Renaissance genius Leonardo da Vinci is on hand to play fairy godfather and bring the pair together. Romantic drama, starring Drew Barrymore, Anjelica Huston, Dougray Scott and Timothy West(n)

programme.title: Hulk (2003)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Bruce Banner turns into the rampaging green Hulk after exposure to a huge dose of gamma radiation, prompting the military to embark on a no-holds-barred mission to destroy the monster. Meanwhile, Banner's unstable father resurfaces, holding the secret to his transformation. Comic-book adventure from director Ang Lee, starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott and Nick Nolte(n)

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan(n)

programme.title: Bridge of Spies (2015)
programme.desc: A lawyer in 1950s New York is hired to represent a Soviet spy in a showcase trial designed to demonstrate the fairness of the US justice system. In the face of public condemnation, he argues against the death penalty, a stance that years later leads to his involvement in an exchange of prisoners in East Germany. Steven Spielberg's fact-based Cold War drama, starring Tom Hanks and an Oscar-winning Mark Rylance(n)

programme.title: Gone Girl (2014)
programme.desc: A woman disappears without trace on her fifth wedding anniversary. Her husband contacts the police, but struggles to cope as his marriage is scrutinised by the media. As his behaviour grows stranger and more evasive, he finds himself accused of her murder. David Fincher's crime thriller based on Gillian Flynn's novel, starring Ben Affleck, Rosamund Pike and Neil Patrick Harris(n)

programme.title: Andrei Rublev (1966)
programme.desc: Andrei Tarkovsky's acclaimed historical drama chronicling the life of the 15th-century monk, icon painter and political activist, who leaves his monastery to travel to Moscow and witnesses an incident that causes him to take a vow of silence and renounce painting for more than a decade. Starring Anatoliy Solonitsyn and Ivan Lapikov. In Russian(n)

Swashbuckling adventure, based on the classic story by Alexandre Dumas, starring Richard Chamberlain in a dual role, with Patrick McGoohan, Louis Jourdan and Jenny Agutter(n)

Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover(n)

programme.title: The Churchills
programme.desc: Historian David Starkey describes how Winston Churchill drew on the lessons of his ancestor John to lead the UK through the Second World War. At two key moments, the prime minister's strategic sense helped avert disaster, and in both decisions, the influence of the Duke of Marlborough is apparent. Starkey argues that it was Winston's ability to control events by giving them a narrative meaning that enabled him to shape world history long after his fall from power(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britain's most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontes, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Bronte Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Bronte hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their father's parsonage home(n)

programme.title: War Factories

programme.title: War Factories

programme.title: War Factories

programme.title: The Churchills
programme.desc: Historian David Starkey describes how Winston Churchill drew on the lessons of his ancestor John to lead the UK through the Second World War. At two key moments, the prime minister's strategic sense helped avert disaster, and in both decisions, the influence of the Duke of Marlborough is apparent. Starkey argues that it was Winston's ability to control events by giving them a narrative meaning that enabled him to shape world history long after his fall from power(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britain's most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontes, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Bronte Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Bronte hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their father's parsonage home(n)

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Cafe Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family-run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Sean Lock and Harriet Kemsley take on Jon Richardson and Chris McCausland in the words-and-numbers quiz. Nick Helm joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: Princess Diana's 'Wicked' Stepmother
programme.desc: An examination of the turbulent relationship between Diana, Princess of Wales and her formidable stepmother Raine Spencer, who rose from humble origins with the help of her larger-than-life mother, the novelist Barbara Cartland, to become a countess and a member of the royal family. Raine was a divisive figure, who was doted on by her husband Johnnie Spencer but loathed by Diana and her siblings. Yet as the princess's marriage collapsed, she reached out to her stepmother for support, marking a change in the women's relationship(n)

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: All eyes are on Ayo following a trip home to see his family, leaving him cornered in Hackney, while Yorkshire girls Anna and Elizabeth find themselves back in the Dales - unaware the hunters are just one step behind them. Nick risks a visit to his childhood haunts, and Madu is hiding out with old university friends in Swansea. Have they reached the end of the line?(n)

programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Rough Guide to the Future
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud sends three celebrities around the world to take a light-hearted look at some of the planet's biggest issues and the technology that could offer solutions. This time, Jon Richardson travels to a town that claims to be America's most eco-friendly, while in Japan, Alice Levine finds out where robots go to die. Elsewhere, Phil Wang heads to a futuristic farm in China(n)

programme.title: How to Stay Out of Jail
programme.desc: Documentary about an alternative to prison set up by the police in County Durham, in which arrested criminals can avoid being tried and imprisoned for their crime in exchange for a pledge to never reoffend. The idea is in response to high levels of reoffending from released prisoners and offers an alternative to a life of crime - but for many, the promise requires sweeping changes to their lives that are hard to maintain(n)

programme.title: Prison
programme.desc: The return of the documentary offering an insight into life inside a British jail from the perspective of both staff and inmates, this time coming from HMP Foston Hall in Derbyshire, where more than 300 women are incarcerated for everything from non-payment of fines to murder. The opening edition focuses on the First Nights Unit, where inmates can arrive for sentences as short as just a few weeks(n)

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty's end-of-the-pier cafe sees Doctor Who star Jodie Whittaker drop in for a cooking lesson that's 'out of this world'. In a cafe about the size of the Tardis, Jodie helps the boys rustle up a packed menu, including roast pork complete with a double helping of crispy crackling, and an authentic Thai beef massaman curry that Jodie's been dreaming about since she was 18. The boys are also back on the road, campaigning to keep sustainable British brown crabs on the menu, and Jimmy uses his DIY skills to create a barbecue out of an oil drum for the Harlequins ladies rugby squad(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Unicorn Inn in Ludlow, Shropshire, where husband and wife team Lee and Zoe Osbourne hope their glamorous fairy-tale style rooms will impress(n)

programme.title: Posh Pawn
programme.desc: A sculptor wants to sell a life-size statue of David Beckham, James takes a rare Porsche for a spin, and Claudia values a pair of designer handbags for a customer who is trying to fund a mansion for her cat. A member of the team drops a bombshell as a rival high-end pawnbroking store opens its doors in Manchester City Centre(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Surrey and Hampshire. Simon builds a huge kitchen table from discarded rafters and gives a 1970s campervan a new lease of life. Henry hankers after an American tractor and Royal Enfield motorbike and sidecar(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four amateur cooks from Bristol host dinner parties in a bid to win the £1,000 prize. Salesman Tony Boniface, mother Tess Swan-Ingrey, mortgage broker Ian Perryman and drugs worker Cathy Lord compete during evenings featuring 1980s disco moments and a sausage dance(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In South Yorkshire, Phil and Kate get the contest started with a menu inspired by their most romantic meals. Day two sees loved-up bus drivers Lee and Dawn cooking up favourite dishes from their wedding day, before plant biologist Katie and micro-brewer Ed try to impress with a Spanish-inspired menu(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada
programme.desc: Gary Muldoon, president of Canada's leading pest control service, dons a disguise to find out what his staff are doing to maintain his firm's reputation in the face of stiff competition from new rivals(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eatery's decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brother's trust before he can save their business(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra nags Raymond to tidy up after himself, but he is more concerned with a letter he has received from his sporting hero - which accidentally ends up in the bin(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An offhand comment to the twins' new friend has dire consequences for Ray, who cannot understand why everyone is so upset - but he compounds his error by accidentally repeating the remark to the boy's father. Ray Romano stars(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bebe advises Frasier to feign illness to secure a pay rise and prove he is indispensable, but the station responds by cleaning out his cubicle and auditioning for a replacement. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Harriet Sansom Harris(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers buy into a restaurant, but their conflicting views on everything leave them without a head chef on opening night - and most of the waiters also walk out. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas is in Paphos in Cyprus with couple Pauline and Andy. After getting engaged on the island, the pair would now like to find their own bolthole here to share with their family for extended breaks. With the thought of one day also retiring out here, the pressure is on Scarlette to show them five top properties within their budget of £80,000(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: The return of the programme that catches up with British expats who set up new businesses in Spain and France, including two campsite owners whose strict rules on-site have put their business at risk and an enterprising couple running a handmade soap and candle company(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business(n)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The six remaining potters are challenged to produce handmade tiles to fit a fireplace surround and hearth, before throwing a chimney in the second challenge for a chance to secure a place in the quarter final. Hosted by Melanie Sykes(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A nine-year-old boy falls over and lands on his head, and is left unable to move his limbs. As he waits for the results, the boy's father shares his feelings on the challenges of parenthood. Elsewhere, an 80-year-old woman is brought in with a dangerously swollen tongue and a nine-year-old girl is treated after falling off a swing, leaving consultant Rahail considering how the balance of care between parents and children shifts over time(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The fly-on-the-wall series turning the cameras on TV's most vocal armchair critics returns, as the show's regular gaggle of families, friends and viewing party acquaintances settle down to share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques on what they have been watching during the week from the comfort of their own sofas(n)

programme.title: Prison
programme.desc: This edition focuses on a new prisoner-led therapy group at HMP Foston Hall to help inmates who are suffering from the effects of long-term emotional, physical or sexual abuse. The leader is no-nonsense Sonia, who is inside for attempted murder, but even she has her work cut out with Janine, who had to be forcibly removed from her last course(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reece, a 26-year-old semi-professional footballer, is worried that his height will stop him from scoring with his date - 29-year-old marketing consultant Ria. Cameras also follow funeral director and mortician Byron who meets 34-year-old meets Lexi, an Ann Summers party planner. Other daters include bartender Rosco, who has a liaison with stunning 28-year-old, Helen(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Sean Lock and Harriet Kemsley take on Jon Richardson and Chris McCausland in the words-and-numbers quiz. Nick Helm joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: My Family and the Galapagos
programme.desc: In 1978, the Galapagos Islands were designated a Unesco World Heritage site, signifying their unprecedented importance to the world. Forty years on, biologist, broadcaster and conservationist Monty Halls returns to his 'favourite place on Earth' to investigate the wonders and challenges that both define and threaten this jewel of nature. Monty is accompanied by a unique research team - his wife Tam and daughters Isla and Molly, who for three months will experience this utterly unique way of life(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: The return of the programme that catches up with British expats who set up new businesses in Spain and France, including two campsite owners whose strict rules on-site have put their business at risk and an enterprising couple running a handmade soap and candle company(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the East Walls Hotel in Chichester, West Sussex, owned by history-loving husband and wife Celia and Damon Haughey, who have rejected the boutique label(n)

programme.title: Posh Pawn
programme.desc: James Constantinou sets sail on the high seas in a historic boat, the owner of which is seeking £750,000 to fulfil his dream of becoming a well-known children's author. Meanwhile, Lawrence is tasked with selling an original Kerry Darlington painting for a memorable returning client, and Essex girl Lucy needs an urgent loan to pay for her mother's funeral, and seeks to secure the money she requires using a diamond ring that has been in her family for generations(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The programme heads to Lowestoft in Suffolk, where Henry Cole picks a valuable Lyons Tea enamel sign while Simon O'Brien converts a station trolley into a garden sofa(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rosita Bowkat, a woman with a penchant for risque conversation, takes on landlady Tania Jones, fitness fanatic Nicholas Clarke and Take That tribute band member Tony James as the dinner-party challenge heads to Worcester. Among the week's highlights are a menu featuring gazelle horns, a Spartacus-themed evening and a frightening pig mask(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Couples from the West Midlands compete for the cash prize of £1,000. First to host are Sam and Karl, with an '80s-inspired menu. Then, Ange and Dave cook up recipes using only the finest ingredients - according to them. Finally, it's Cleo and Nick's chance to impress with their American-inspired dishes(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada
programme.desc: Andy Clark, the founder and executive chairman of Clark Builders, poses as a labourer among the crews of his own building sites to discover ways to improve productivity. He also looks to find out whether the values of the workforce have changed in the 30 years that have passed since he did the same job(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couple's two children are struggling to save the business from their parents' disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank puts salt on Marie's home-made lasagne, causing her to think she is turning into a terrible cook, but Ray and Robert discover their father has lost his sense of taste - apparently because of a potency medication he is taking. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin prepares to celebrate his birthday, but an argument between Niles and Frasier over a patient, as well as a city-wide power cut, ensures none of the household is in the mood for a party. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio station's new manager disagrees with everything Frasier says - and when the shrink objects to her ideas, he finds his show rescheduled at two o'clock in the morning. Comedy, guest starring Mercedes Ruehl, with Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Angela and Steve from Leicestershire search for a second home in Lanzarote that they can move to permanently after retirement, with a budget of £225,000(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Revisiting two former estate agents-turned-winemakers in France, and a couple of boat-lovers living in Mallorca who are planning to expand their business(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's hornbills have survived a fire that swept through their home, but it may have derailed their plans for chicks, while meerkat matriarch Huskie seems to have lost her breeding instincts after losing her solitary pup nine months ago. Is she finally ready to be a mum again? Sun bear Milli already has her paws full bringing up her feisty daughter Kyra. However, the one-year-old's cuteness belies her devilish and destructive nature(n)

programme.title: American Made (2017)
programme.desc: A pilot is recruited to act as a courier for the CIA in the 1980s, carrying out covert deliveries from the US to General Noriega's regime in Panama. However, he exploits the opportunity to set up a profitable sideline trafficking drugs for a cartel. His dangerous double life takes a darker turn when he is ordered to supply weapons to far-right rebel groups operating in Nicaragua. Fact-based comedy drama, starring Tom Cruise and Domhnall Gleeson(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The fly-on-the-wall series turning the cameras on TV's most vocal armchair critics returns. Shows reviewed are The Stranger, Love Is Blind, EastEnders, Crazy Delicious, Spy In The Wild, Hunted, and ITV News reports on Harry and Meghan, and brain surgery(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's attempt to help Leo enjoy the finer points of New York has unexpected consequences, while Jack takes part in a spelling contest with help from his coach Karen. Guest starring Harry Connick Jr(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Part one of two. Charlie falls for crazy woman Frankie (guest star Jenna Elfman) whom he sees smashing up a car. Despite a worried Alan's protests, Frankie comes home with the pair - leading to a battle for her affections between the brothers(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Part two of two. Frankie reveals the reason she and daughter Joanie are on the run. Alan feels aggrieved by his mother's assumption that their guest is sleeping with Charlie, but cheers up once it becomes apparent Frankie's interested in him(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is furious when Alan chooses his cousins as Jake's guardians in the event of his death - but when the boy hurts himself playing basketball, the bachelor sees an opportunity to prove his worth. Judith provides her ex-husband with a lengthy list of legal demands. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to meet an old flame, but is stunned to learn his former girlfriend, Jill, is now a man. The shock does not end there as Evelyn turns her attentions to her son's 'new' friend. As a relationship blossoms, the rest of the family waits to see how she will handle the inevitable revelation(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Judith's sister Liz (guest star Teri Hatcher) turns up at Jake's birthday party, to the delight of Charlie, who remembers her from a previous encounter. Humiliatingly, it seems she does not recall him - and worse, is determined to seduce Alan. Meanwhile, Rose goes to a wedding in a clown costume(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Judith suggests that Jake see a therapist to help him get over his parents' divorce. Charlie and Alan are unconvinced the split is to blame for the boy's mood, while Evelyn uses the situation as an excuse to offload her own resentment. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen and Angus T Jones(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie forms a relationship with Alan's divorce attorney, whose demands quickly become excessive even for the womanising musician - but the short-lived flirtation threatens to jeopardise his brother's chances of obtaining the settlement he wants. Comedy, guest starring Heather Locklear(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan starts sleepwalking, and Charlie feels duty-bound to cure him. Meanwhile, Jake starts seeing a therapist. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Jake's inappropriate remarks at a meeting of Judith's divorcee support group prompt his furious mother to tell Alan she does not want her son living with Charlie any longer. The womanising musician goes to the next meeting and struggles to convince the ladies he has a good influence on his nephew(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie makes a doctor's appointment for a vasectomy - but decides to freeze some sperm in case he ever wants children. However, the simple procedure of producing a sample seems destined to fail as his family and friends manage to thwart one attempt after another. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collectors take action to serve a writ issued for the organiser of a music festival(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve in East London try to recover over £7,000 owed by a restaurant owner for an unpaid gas bill, while officers Gareth and Mitch in Gloucestershire seek just under £3,000 from the owner of a car wash. Stewart and Vic are in Manchester trying to recover nearly £5,000 owed by a blinds and shutters supplier to a dissatisfied customer(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Mitch are on the trail of £2,500 in unpaid parking tickets in Cardiff, and while the debtor is not at home, they notice his car is sporting false number plates and call the police. The duo also face an angry defendant in Swindon when trying to collect £2,000 for unpaid rent on a lock-up, while in Buckinghamshire, Matt and Garry consider seizing a haul of luxury watches to pay more than £16,000 owed to a landlord(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor set out to evict a tenant from a property in Manchester but when the man claims he knew nothing about the court order tempers begin to fray. A car salesman in Cumbria is not happy about paying £4,500 to a dissatisfied customer, and in Shropshire a pub licensee claims she is unable to pay the rent she owes to her ex-landlord. With emotions running high, can she cut a new deal?(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Letting agent Paul is called to a houseshare after fighting, cannabis use and partying drive one resident out of the property establishes the source of the problem is a young couple. Harrow housing agents Andrew and Jo find a suspected unlicensed multiple-occupancy house in gross disrepair. After tracking down the landlord, they have mercy and allow him to spend his £5,000 fine on fixing up the property, in the hope he will turn it into a nice family home. But will the he be as good as his word?(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The housing team in Harrow accompany the police on a raid after receiving reports of dangerous conditions at a home belonging to a notorious slumlord's brother. Lettings agent John wants to turn a former Blackpool hotel into bedsits, but a routine check on the property reveals not only a severely neglected house, but also a drugs den littered with paraphernalia and some of the worst conditions he has ever witnessed(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A retired couple in a seaside village in Norfolk battle with their non-paying tenant living in the flat above them, so they ask eviction expert Paul to help. Blackpool lettings agent John comes up against a hard drug user who is attracting antisocial wrongdoers to the bedsits that John runs, while in Leicestershire, Sharon battles to reclaim a property from a former friend who is close to £3,500 in arrears with rent(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The investigation into the 2016 killing of 15-year-old Paige Doherty, who went missing on the way to her Saturday job in Clydebank, Scotland - and whose body was discovered two days after she was reported missing. The documentary looks back at the police investigation as detectives retrace the teenager's last steps, and reveals how CCTV proved crucial in solving the crime(n)

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve (2004)
programme.desc: The crooks reunite when an old enemy catches up with them and demands they repay the money they stole from him three years previously. In response, the gang comes up with another larcenous plan - but reckons without the interventions of a fellow thief and a sultry Interpol agent. Crime caper sequel, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia and Don Cheadle(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medic treats a former marine who claims to have Gulf War syndrome and tests suggest he was exposed to uranium during his time in Iraq. However, House rejects pleas to treat for radiation toxicity and offers his own solution. Meanwhile, Cameron's flirtatious advances confuse Chase. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A pregnant woman's condition deteriorates after a stroke, and the medic wonders whether she has a rare condition causing symptoms in a mother to reflect those of the foetus. Cuddy learns the patient has been asked to choose between her own life and that of the baby, causing friction with House over how to handle the case. Meanwhile, Cameron and Chase's secret relationship is exposed. Anne Ramsay guest stars(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Landlord Nicholas Parrington discovers a couple are subletting his house, just months after a previous tenant had turned the property into a brothel, while investors in a community centre for children are aghast when squatters move into their building. In Lewisham, the council's Rogue Landlord Unit raids one of their main streets, on the lookout for slum conditions, illegal overcrowding and criminal activities(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord's tenants refuse to move out, so he starts extensive building work around them, while another landlord tries to recover £30,000 in unpaid rent through the courts(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor are in Manchester to recover £4,000 owed to a firm of architects, only for the debtor to attempt to throw them off the scent. Stewart is joined by Vic in Liverpool to track down a landlord who owes his former tenants deposits totalling £5,000, while Gareth and Mitch are in for a surprise when they chase a builder in Wiltshire(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian O'Shaughnessy and Graham Aldred's first case sees them in a Brighton health spa as they search for assets to seize in pursuit of a £20,000 debt. Following a stand-off, they devise a way to work with the owner and her professional advisers to come up with a solution. Later, Graham reveals his softer side when he revisits a woman who defaulted on a debt payment plan(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Finn jumps at Toadie's offer of work at the Foundation, Jane finds herself wondering about Elly, and Roxy finds an intruder in her home, but is surprised to see a familiar face(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Robbo and Jasmine are happy for Tori but are in despair at the prospect of losing Grace. Irene is concerned about Leah, who is missing and not returning phone calls(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A fighter pilot suffering from hallucinations seeks a secret consultation with House, fearing revelations of her illness will affect her chances of applying for the Nasa astronaut training programme. The acerbic doctor seizes the opportunity to whittle down the 40 applicants for his new medical team by presenting them with the puzzling case. Hugh Laurie and Anne Dudek star(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctor splits the 10 remaining candidates for his medical team into two groups to treat a disabled man suffering from fainting spells, with the first to solve the problem being kept in the running to join his staff. When the patient begins to experience further symptoms, House is required to put the games to one side and take over the case himself. Hugh Laurie stars as the irascible medic(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Finn jumps at Toadie's offer of work at the Foundation, Jane finds herself wondering about Elly, and Roxy finds an intruder in her home, but is surprised to see a familiar face(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Concern mounts for Leah, who has been missing for over a day, Tori accepts that Grace is her daughter, and Willow is rattled by a reminder that Alex will be leaving soon(n)

programme.title: Now That's Funny!
programme.desc: A collection of internet-sourced videos with a family friendly hook, featuring some dating dos and don'ts and a selection of kitchen nightmares. Plus, hilarious horseplay, fishing for kittens and the Stars of the Week(n)

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: When a body is found in woodland 12 hours after an elderly couple are reported missing, residents in a rural village react with shock at the thought of a killer in their midst. Police and forensic teams worked fast and quickly made an arrest, but soon another name was in the frame, although the search for this new suspect would lead detectives far and wide. One question remained, however. Where was the second body?(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: The documentary follows 34-year-old Shaun from Stockton-on-Tees who has been on and off benefits - and in and out of trouble with the police - since leaving school, and is finally trying to turn his life around. Leon from Ashton-under-Lyme is fed up of only finding jobs with zero-hours contracts but cannot afford the transport to look further afield, while Knowsley-based cab driver Mark has not worked since having his licence revoked following an angina attack two years ago. Now he struggles to manage the stairs to his flat and needs moving to a new home(n)

programme.title: Botched Up Bodies
programme.desc: Documentary about doctors at the Chelsea and Westminster Hospital who treat people whose cosmetic surgery has gone wrong(n)

programme.title: Tortured By Mum and Dad? The Turpin 13
programme.desc: This documentary investigates the shocking story of David and Louise Turpin, who kept their 13 children imprisoned in their own home until they were found in January 2018 when one of the siblings escaped and called the police. This programme shines a light on the mystery of how an unassuming suburban family in California managed to hide their dark and sinister secret for so long(n)

programme.title: Missing or Murdered?
programme.desc: A look at the case of 35-year-old chef Claudia Lawrence, who disappeared in 2009 sparking one of the most high profile missing persons cases of recent years. The programme examines how media coverage of Claudia's private life impacted on the police investigation, and analyses theories of what really happened, including a recent possible sighting of her in Amsterdam and her mother's fears of sex trafficking(n)

programme.title: Riverdale
programme.desc: Betty and Archie race to save the school caretaker after the Black Hood declares the town has fialed his test, Jughead leads an uprising, and Fred faces a hefty medical bill(n)

programme.title: Riverdale
programme.desc: Betty searches for her estranged brother, and a land deal results in a school being closed and members of the Serpent gang enrolling in Riverdale High(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Mia arrives back in town with her troupe and asks Charlie to come and see her perform. Despite being reluctant he goes along, but once there she makes a strange request of him - and he asks something of her too. Starring Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: 3rd Rock from the Sun
programme.desc: Harry runs for city councillor but Dick finds it hard to grasp the complexities of the democratic system and struggles to cast the right vote. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Jane Curtin, Kristen Johnston and French Stewart(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A man on board a flight becomes violently ill, and fellow passengers House and Cuddy suspect they are dealing with a meningitis outbreak when a woman develops the same symptoms. The doctor hastily puts together a team to help solve the mystery and performs a spinal tap using makeshift tools. Meanwhile, Cameron and Chase's relationship begins to affect their work(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl suffers a stroke, and it later emerges she has a heart condition normally only found in older people. Cameron and Chase visit the youngster's home in search of a cause and find evidence of possible abuse. Meanwhile, Wilson takes Cuddy to see a play(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A Yorkshire landlord has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A retired secretary has to visit her tenant in prison to retake possession of her buy-to-let flat. A Manchester mother applies to the housing charity Shelter for help because she is convinced the property she is renting is making her children ill(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic take on an eviction case in Nottingham, where a landlord wants his property back after months of rent arrears and alleged anti-social behaviour - and find themselves confronted by a volatile tenant who insists he has the right to stay and refuses to back down. The duo also chase £5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement agents try to mediate a dispute in a takeaway, and deal with rent evaders living in potentially deadly conditions. Plus, a businessman faces financial ruin(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Terese discovers the reason why Paige is back in town, Chloe starts working for Terese again, and Jane struggles to hide her embarrassment, declining help from Paul and Dipi(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Concern mounts for Leah, who has been missing for over a day, Tori accepts that Grace is her daughter, and Willow is rattled by a reminder that Alex will be leaving soon(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The acerbic doctor tries to whittle down the seven remaining candidates for his medical team by assigning them the case of a woman who claims she can see the dead. Meanwhile, Cuddy offers Foreman a position back at the hospital, but he is reluctant to accept once it is revealed he will have to work side by side with House. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The maverick physician is forced to confront his own limitations when presented with a mugging victim who mimics the personalities of those around him, making it almost impossible for him to differentiate between the patient's genuine and false symptoms. Meanwhile, Foreman returns to the hospital to supervise the remaining applicants. Frank Whaley guest stars, with Hugh Laurie and Omar Epps(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Terese discovers the reason why Paige is back in town, Chloe starts working for Terese again, and Jane struggles to hide her embarrassment, declining help from Paul and Dipi(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin and Irene report Leah missing to the police, Dean and Ziggy are struggling in their own ways to deal with their break-up, and Willow opens her heart to Alex(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Documentary chronicling the ups and downs of life for people on benefits in the UK, beginning with a visit to Liverpool to look at the effect of the bedroom tax. Lorna was living in a three-bedroom housing association home with her children, but when they moved out she was hit with a weekly £40 bedroom tax, which she has to pay out of her £72.40 employment and support allowance. Keith and Marie had been in their family home for 35 years, but after refusing to pay an extra £24 they were rehoused in a one-bedroom flat and forbidden from taking any of their animals with them(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Documentary examining the lives of people dependent on state welfare in the Norfolk seaside town of Great Yarmouth, where the majority of work is seasonal. Leona and Lee worry about their three-month-old daughter's future when their payments are cut because they failed to fill in the correct forms, while Jordan McDonald has his benefits halved after the job centre discovers he has not attended a government work programme(n)

programme.title: Beetlejuice (1988)
programme.desc: Recently deceased couple Adam and Barbara Maitland enlist the professional services of a hard-boiled veteran ghost to scare away the obnoxious yuppie family who have moved into their former home. Tim Burton's supernatural comedy, starring Michael Keaton, Geena Davis, Alec Baldwin, Winona Ryder, Jeffrey Jones and Catherine O'Hara(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

programme.title: Beetlejuice (1988)
programme.desc: Recently deceased couple Adam and Barbara Maitland enlist the professional services of a hard-boiled veteran ghost to scare away the obnoxious yuppie family who have moved into their former home. Tim Burton's supernatural comedy, starring Michael Keaton, Geena Davis, Alec Baldwin, Winona Ryder, Jeffrey Jones and Catherine O'Hara(n)

programme.title: The Island (2005)
programme.desc: The naive survivors of an apparent ecological disaster work, rest and play inside their utopian sealed community in the year 2019, each hoping to win a ticket to an idyllic island in a regular lottery draw. However, a curious inhabitant discovers the restricted society is a facade shielding a sinister cloning operation and is determined to escape. Sci-fi thriller, starring Ewan McGregor, Scarlett Johansson, Sean Bean and Steve Buscemi(n)

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Dead Weight (1971)
programme.desc: The dishevelled detective suspects a highly respected general is guilty of murdering an associate who was about to expose the war hero's shady business dealings, but Columbo has a hard time backing up his hunch with evidence because of the lack of a body or a weapon. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Eddie Albert, Suzanne Pleshette and John Kerr(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder, Smoke and Shadows (1989)
programme.desc: An ambitious Hollywood director is visited by an old friend, who threatens to expose evidence of his involvement in the death of an actor. The film-maker resorts to murder to keep his dark secret safe, only to end up on the receiving end of Columbo's distinctive brand of interrogation. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Fisher Stevens and Molly Hagan(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Suitable for Framing (1971)
programme.desc: A millionaire art collector is thought to have been killed as the result of a random burglary. However, Columbo is convinced the dead man's nephew committed the crime to avoid being written out of the will, and embarks on a mission to ensnare his suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ross Martin and Don Ameche(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Playback (1975)
programme.desc: An inventor tries to stop his mother-in-law from exposing his infidelities by murdering her in front of a security camera - and tampering with the recording to make it look like the killing occurred at a time when he had an alibi. However, Columbo sees through his hi-tech ruse and tries to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Oskar Werner and Gena Rowlands(n)

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Following their investigation into departed agent Brody's relationship with terrorist John Russo, the FBI continues to cause trouble for the team. This time, the bureau turns its attention to a homicide case, in which Pride's friend Elvis Bertrand, a US Navy intelligence analyst, has been labelled the prime suspect. Determined to keep the matter within the Navy, Pride and his colleagues manage to get hold of crucial evidence, forcing the FBI to work with them(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a decorated petty officer, whose body was found in a sports arena. The victim was discovered clutching a rifle, and it seems he had been engaged in a fire-fight, but when the agents fire the weapon, they discover it is a tranquilliser gun. A chain of evidence leads the investigators to a past kidnapping case involving another petty officer, who was last seen in Mexico. Meanwhile, Tammy Gregorio officially joins the team, as Pride seeks a way to get the FBI off his back(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A candidate for the next New York mayoral elections finds her campaign in jeopardy when Goren and Eames investigate her husband on suspicion of hiring a hitman to kill a judge. However, evidence resulting from a tip-off and the discovery of a second body may be a little too neat - and instead indicate a conspiracy. Xander Berkeley guest stars, with Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A missing teenager leads the team to a man preying on the daughters he fathered through a sperm bank. Starring BD Wong, James Van Der Beek and Eric Close(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After witnessing a kidnapping, Rollins discovers the abductee was a 19-year-old woman involved in the world of body modification. When her leg is found in a canal, the detectives learn another limb was also discovered in the same area 11 years previously, and the same technique was used to sever it. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cragen goes undercover when a murder in Brighton Beach leads the team to a thriving mail-order bride business, and hopes to hunt down the killer. Elsewhere, the detectives expose a blackmail scam run by the Russian Mafia. Crime drama, guest starring Timothy Busfield and Izabella Miko(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An emotionally disturbed man claims to have witnessed a rape in a hospital. Despite the witness's dubious credibility the SVU investigates, but the alleged victim denies being assaulted. Crime drama, guest starring Natasha Lyonne and Carrie Preston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Jaruszalski and Moralez are embroiled in the murky world of Californian politics while investigating a hit-and-run incident in which a waitress loses her unborn child. The woman's ex-husband becomes their first suspect, closely followed by the child's father - who it seems is intent on keeping his image clean in public. Crime drama, starring Corey Stall and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: TJ and Winters examine the death of an oil-rig worker who was found on shore, and follow the evidence to a drilling platform off the California coast. Eventually, a female supervisor is accused of murder, but her celebrity defence attorney argues that she was the victim of constant sexual harassment(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed(n)
